narrative:
Wayne (precinct in Clinton County) has 424 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 49.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 5.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 43.9 percentage points.
